---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new, or a change to how something works today
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve**
Describe the problem or gap. Prefer a concrete scenario over an abstract
one ("when I do X on a Cloud-Server install, Y doesn't happen and I have to
work around it by...").

**Proposed change**
What you'd like to see. If you're not sure of the exact mechanism, that's
fine — describe the outcome.

**Does this fit the project's scope?**
Skim `README.md`'s "Scope and limitations" and "Design boundaries" sections
first. If your proposal is a GUI, a hosted dashboard, a proprietary memory
store, or something that intercepts tool calls at runtime, it's likely out
of scope by design — say why this case is different, if you think it is.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other way you could get the same result today, and why it falls short.
